name: Creation Pipeline - Approved Opportunity to Live Business

parameters.text:
=🏗️ *Creation Pipeline Started*

Business: *{{ $json.businessName }}*
ID: `{{ $json.businessId }}`
Category: {{ $json.category }}

Step 1/6: Bootstrapping memory-bank files...

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ businessId: $('Extract Payload').first().json.businessId, businessName: $('Extract Payload').first().json.businessName, businessDescription: $('Extract Payload').first().json.businessDescription }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ businessId: $('Extract Payload').first().json.businessId, businessName: $('Extract Payload').first().json.businessName, businessDescription: $('Extract Payload').first().json.businessDescription, category: $('Extract Payload').first().json.category, opportunityData: $('Extract Payload').first().json.opportunityData || {} }) }}

parameters.text:
=✅ *PRD Approved* for *{{ $json.businessName }}*

Comptroller says GO.

Step 3/6: Creating repo & triggering Claude Code with PRD...

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ businessId: $('Check PRD Result').first().json.businessId, businessName: $('Check PRD Result').first().json.businessName, repoName: $('Check PRD Result').first().json.businessId, techStack: 'nextjs', prdContent: $('Check PRD Result').first().json.prdContent }) }}

parameters.text:
=🚀 *Repo created* for *{{ $('Extract Payload').first().json.businessName }}*

Claude Code is now building the MVP from the PRD. This takes ~2 hours.

Step 4/6: Waiting for Claude Code to finish building...

=🧪 *App Test - Final Iteration {{ $json.iterationCount }}/3*

*{{ $json.businessName }}*
Final Score: *{{ $json.lastScore }}/100*

{{ $json.lastScore >= 80 ? '✅ PASS' : '⚠️ LOW SCORE - Human review recommended' }}

Proceeding to quality gate...

=⏰ *Build iteration complete* for *{{ $json.businessName }}*

Final app test score: *{{ $json.finalScore }}/100* after {{ $json.totalIterations }} iteration(s)

{{ $json.iterationSummary }}

Step 5/6: Running quality gate checks...

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ businessId: $('Prepare Quality Gate').first().json.businessId, businessName: $('Prepare Quality Gate').first().json.businessName, siteUrl: $('Prepare Quality Gate').first().json.siteUrl, repoName: $('Prepare Quality Gate').first().json.businessId, appTestScore: $('Prepare Quality Gate').first().json.finalScore, iterationCount: $('Prepare Quality Gate').first().json.totalIterations }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ businessId: $('Parse Quality Gate Result').first().json.businessId, businessName: $('Parse Quality Gate Result').first().json.businessName, siteUrl: $('Parse Quality Gate Result').first().json.siteUrl, category: $('Parse Quality Gate Result').first().json.category, description: $('Parse Quality Gate Result').first().json.businessDescription, pricing: '29' }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ businessId: $('Parse Quality Gate Result').first().json.businessId, businessName: $('Parse Quality Gate Result').first().json.businessName, category: $('Parse Quality Gate Result').first().json.category }) }}

parameters.text:
=🎉 *Pipeline Complete* for *{{ $('Parse Quality Gate Result').first().json.businessName }}*

All done!
- PRD: APPROVED
- App Test: {{ $('Prepare Quality Gate').first().json.finalScore }}/100 ({{ $('Prepare Quality Gate').first().json.totalIterations }} iterations)
- Quality Gate: PASSED
- Directory submissions: triggered
- Lead gen expansion: triggered

The Forge has successfully birthed a new business.

=❌ *Quality Gate: FAIL*

*{{ $json.businessName }}* did NOT pass quality checks.

QG Score: {{ $json.qgScore }}
App Test Score: {{ $json.finalScore }}/100 ({{ $json.totalIterations }} iterations)

Details:
{{ $json.qgDetails }}

Creating remediation issues on GitHub...

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'pipeline_started', businessId: $('Extract Payload').first().json.businessId, businessName: $('Extract Payload').first().json.businessName }) }}

parameters.text:

Proceeding to quality gate anyway. Human review recommended.
